testcase.name: detectCUSUM handles zero sigma reference()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Reference mean should be exact. Expected <0.05> with absolute tolerance <0.001>, actual <1.7976931348623157E308>.

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Reference mean should be exact. Expected <0.05> with absolute tolerance <0.001>, actual <1.7976931348623157E308>. at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.fail(JUnitSupport.kt:56) at kotlin.test.Asserter$DefaultImpls.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:694) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at kotlin.test.UtilsKt.checkDoublesAreEqual(Utils.kt:32) at kotlin.test.UtilsKt.checkDoublesAreEqual$default(Utils.kt:22) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertEquals(Assertions.kt:69) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertEquals(Unknown Source) at io.github.eucsoh.analysis.CUSUMDetectorTest.detectCUSUM handles zero sigma reference(CUSUMDetectorTest.kt:189) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: detectCUSUM computes reference from early data only()
detectCUSUM detects upward shift in resistance()
detectCUSUM with missing metric returns empty()
detectCUSUM detects no alarm in stable data()
detectCUSUM resets after cooldown period()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Should not spam alarms during cooldown

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Should not spam alarms during cooldown at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.fail(JUnitSupport.kt:56) at kotlin.test.Asserter$DefaultImpls.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:694) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at kotlin.test.Asserter$DefaultImpls.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:704) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:44) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertTrue(Unknown Source) at io.github.eucsoh.analysis.CUSUMDetectorTest.detectCUSUM resets after cooldown period(CUSUMDetectorTest.kt:97) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
